overall.description: Static cinematic shot from a video game showing a modern luxury bedroom interior with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking a rainy, overcast futuristic cityscape. The scene features contemporary furniture and atmospheric lighting with no camera movement or action occurring.

segments.scene_description: A static view of a luxurious modern bedroom with a large bed in the foreground and floor-to-ceiling windows revealing a rainy, overcast futuristic cityscape. The room features contemporary design elements including a spherical lamp, glass partitions, and warm interior lighting contrasting with the cool grey exterior. No movement or action occurs throughout the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, cinematic gaze over a luxurious modern bedroom that contrasts warm interior intimacy with a cold, rainy futuristic cityscape. It begins with a focus on the contemporary design of the room, highlighting a large bed in the foreground and a spherical lamp that casts a soft glow. As the eye moves toward the perimeter, the interior warmth meets the sharp transparency of glass partitions and floor-to-ceiling windows. The scene then expands to reveal the overcast urban horizon beyond the glass, where cool grey tones and falling rain define the distant skyline. Finally, the composition settles into a still balance between the sheltered luxury of the bedroom and the atmospheric gloom of the city outside.
